description: Bug-shape → CWE/CAPEC mapping for common Odoo source-code findings. Used by Phase 7/8 to tag findings.

sudo_misuse_idor.label: sudo() bypasses ACL leading to cross-record access

csrf_state_change_get.label: State-changing route accepts GET / missing methods=['POST']

raw_sql_injection.label: cr.execute with f-string / .format / % concatenation of user input

domain_injection.label: search/read domain built from request.params without validation

ssrf_outbound_request.label: requests.get / urllib URL controlled by user input

path_traversal_attachment.label: ir.attachment / file path joined with user input without normalize

hardcoded_secret.label: API key / password / token committed to source

secrets_in_logs.label: Secrets / PII written to ir.logging or _logger
secrets_in_logs.owasp: A09:2021 Security Logging and Monitoring Failures

deserialize_user_input.label: pickle / marshal / yaml.load on attacker bytes
deserialize_user_input.owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures

mass_assignment.label: create/write accepts arbitrary fields from request

ir_rule_global_bypass.label: Record rule scoped to global=True opens cross-company read

external_id_xml_id_clobber.label: Module overwrites external ID owned by another module

race_condition_state.label: Stage transition / approval check vulnerable to TOCTOU
